# cook

> A standards layer for coding agents — detects what a code task touches and compiles only the matching coding-standards rules into one payload.

cook holds no rules of its own. It reads a task surface (file paths, prose, git context), fingerprints it, and stitches rules from the bundled `standards/` library into a single markdown blob for the agent. The fingerprint keys a cache, so an identical surface skips classification and routing and compiles straight from the cached decision. Global P0 rules load on every default run; any explicit flag or prose argument skips that floor and loads exactly what was named.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/README.md): what it does, install, how it works, the full flag and telemetry surface
- [SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/SKILL.md): the router — start here to change behavior; it delegates to the protocols below
- [protocol-cook.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/refs/protocol-cook.md): the default auto path — mode branch table and fingerprint/cache/route logic
- [protocol-explicit.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/refs/protocol-explicit.md): how flags and prose arguments resolve to specific rule files

## Reference

- [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): how the scan → classify → route → load → compile pipeline is wired
- [FLAG-LIST.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/FLAG-LIST.md): the full flag namespace (shelf, concerns, domains, sub-refs)
- [vocab/tag-vocabulary.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/vocab/tag-vocabulary.json): source of truth for the flag namespace
- [standards/global/SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/standards/global/SKILL.md): the always-loaded global floor (SOLID, DRY, security, and the 8 concern refs)
- [telemetry.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/refs/telemetry.md): the opt-in, local-first fire log and what each record holds

## Optional

- [LICENSE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/LICENSE.md): MIT
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history
- [install.sh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ndisisnd/cook/main/install.sh): the curl-pipe installer that fetches and unpacks the skill
